v0.6.0-beta.1.description:
# Crazy Taxi GameCube/Dolphin APWorld Beta v0.6.0

First public beta release for Crazy Taxi GameCube on Dolphin Emulator.

## Target

- Crazy Taxi GameCube
- Dolphin Emulator
- Archipelago 0.6.7

## Features

- Fare checks
- Crazy Box checks through Dolphin GCI save detection
- Crazy Box AP-unlock send gate
- Scalable fare block count
- Scalable Crazy Box goal requirement
- Direct Fare License items
- Progressive and non-progressive Fare License modes
- Manual fare range switching with `/ct_switch` and `/ct_range`
- Automatic jump to the next unlocked incomplete fare range
- Timer extension/reduction items

## Required dependency

Install the Dolphin memory dependency before playing.

### Windows

```powershell
py -m pip install dolphin-memory-engine

### Ubuntu/Linux

python3 -m pip install --user --break-system-packages dolphin-memory-engine

### GCI Save Path

Windows example:
$env:CRAZY_TAXI_GCI_PATH="C:\Users\<YourName>\AppData\Roaming\Dolphin Emulator\GC\USA\Card A"

Ubuntu Flatpak Dolphin Example:
export CRAZY_TAXI_GCI_PATH="$HOME/.var/app/org.DolphinEmu.dolphin-emu/data/dolphin-emu/GC/USA/Card A"

###Important Client Commands
/ct_attach
/ct_status
/ct_gci
/ct_mode crazybox
/ct_mode arcade
/ct_switch 4
/ct_range 4

Use /ct_mode crazybox before playing Crazy Box stages
Use /ct_mode arcade when returning to Arcade fare checks

Known beta limitations
Crazy Box stage lockout is not enforced in-game yet.
The client prevents early Crazy Box check sends by requiring the AP unlock first.
Manual /ct_mode crazybox and /ct_mode arcade are currently required.
Failed fare / DeathLink behavior is currently disabled or experimental.
Wider testing across Dolphin versions is still needed.
v0.6.0-beta.1.title: Crazy Taxi GameCube/Dolphin Beta v0.6.0

added a snap back for stages still locked.
Some errors were cleared up. Less spamming.
